summary: Russian forces destroyed Ukrainian unmanned boats near Tendrov Spit and the Dnipro River mouth using FPV drones. Ukraine is deploying AI-powered HX-2 strike drones from Helsing, with 6,000 delivered and production capacity exceeding 1,000 per month. The "Rubicon" Center reported 132 enemy targets destroyed on March 13, including 35.4% unmanned systems, and 111 targets on March 12, with operations targeting Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs and control points. Ukrainian FPV drones are striking targets up to 100km behind Russian lines, using tactics like simultaneous strikes and thermal disruption, while Russian forces employ "Yolka" and "Elka" anti-drone systems for kinetic intercepts.
